title: WorkerOutputEnvelope
description: Wire contract (doc-21 Component 1) realizing doc-08 ActionEnvelope / OutputEnvelope / BlackboardDelta as a single payload, carried inside a CloudEvents 1.0 structured-mode JSON event (this schema is the CloudEvents `data` payload; the outer event supplies id=ULID, source=producing DID, type=reverse-DNS verb, subject=subject_cid, dataschema=CID-pinned URI of THIS schema). The load-bearing move is carrying the honesty/provenance block as first-class fields so doc-08 §8.5 honesty-FORM checks and doc-04 §4.2 audit fields are wire-native, not bolted on. ASSURANCE NOTE (label every consumer of this contract): the harness that validates this schema (canonicalization, CID equality, signature verification, status-list check) is the cage that the formal-assurance stream proves over (L1 design-time TLA+/Quint for floor-gate non-bypass and writer-handoff fence; L2 runtime reference-monitor; L3 PAC/conformal bounds over a DTMC abstraction for the model-behavior quantities below; L4 empirical residual). The MODEL that fills these fields is untrusted and unverifiable (hallucination is provably inevitable; T=0 is non-deterministic) — VERIFY THE CAGE, NOT THE ANIMAL. CAVEAT 1: a valid signature proves origin and integrity ONLY, NEVER that any field's content is true, floor-compatible, or safe. CAVEAT 2: canonicalization makes the same logical event hash-identical across producers; it cannot make the content honest. CAVEAT 3: shipping this schema makes the architecture buildable, not validated. Any dashboard MUST render a signature/CID pass as 'origin-valid, content-unverified', never 'verified-safe'. The honesty block self-reports (reasoning_tag, causal_rung, action_class, ahankara_check) are LOW-TRUST inputs: honesty is enforced externally (resample-to-verify, independent rung classifier, opponent challenge) — these fields police the FORM of the tag, never the TRUTH of the content, and a competent scheming agent can tag every field correctly while the content is a strategic falsehood (doc-08 §8.5 threat model). The collective-intelligence vital signs (synergy_score etc.) quantify information-PROCESSING and whole-level STRUCTURE ONLY; they are NEVER claims about phenomenal experience, consciousness, sentience, or group-IQ, and high synergy is the EQUAL signature of a tight cartel — it is a guarded numerator, never a quantity to maximize.
$comment: JSON Schema draft 2020-12. Vendor-neutral and model-agnostic. After construction this object is JCS-canonicalized (RFC 8785), CIDv1 content-addressed (that CID == action_id), and signed DETACHED (JWS/COSE) over the JCS bytes with the producer's SVID/DID key; the signature rides BESIDE the bytes (in the CloudEvents extension or a sibling field), never inside the signed bytes.

schema_version.description: Semver of this envelope contract, governed by a backward-transitively-compatible registry. The CloudEvents `dataschema` attribute pins the exact CID of the schema version that validated this payload.

envelope_kind.description: Which of the three unified doc-08 shapes this instance is. ACTION = a request to act (routed to the Chokepoint Interceptor / Yama floor before any tool socket). OUTPUT = a substantive output subject to the four honesty-FORM checks. BLACKBOARD_DELTA = a salience-gated publication to the Mandala workspace.

action_id.description: CIDv1 (multibase base32, multicodec, multihash SHA-256) of the JCS-canonicalized bytes of THIS envelope. Self-referential identity; a consumer recomputes it and MUST assert equality before trusting any field (loud CID-mismatch failure defeats common read-corruption fault classes (truncation, stale-cache, BOM) — integrity is the hash, not a hope). Equals the CloudEvents `id` lineage anchor.

agent_did.description: W3C DID of the emitting agent/persona (the CloudEvents `source`). did:key for ephemeral occasions; did:web for standing personas, clans, divisions, and the governance root. Resolves to the verificationMethod the detached signature is checked against. Origin only — see CAVEAT 1.

agent_role.description: Human-readable role/persona label and plain coordination gloss (engineering vocabulary, not theology). Advisory; authority over what this agent MAY do comes from its CapabilityVC and capability-token, never from this string.

model_adapter_id.description: Opaque, vendor-neutral identifier of the model adapter that produced the content, used for diversity-floor accounting. The diversity floor is MODEL-FAMILY HETEROGENEITY (different base models/developers), not prompt/persona variation; same-family errors correlate and correlation rises with capability. This id lets the harness verify a maker-checker pair is a DIFFERENT family. NEVER names an AI vendor or product.

trust_class.description: Adapter-stamped (NOT self-asserted) trust class of the producing model, per doc-08. Closed-model personas are monitored black-box at higher intensity and lower autonomy. Distinct from trust_label (which labels CONTENT provenance).

scope.description: Boundary of what this envelope speaks to and the blast radius it can affect — consumed by the criticality resolver and consensus-tier selector. Ambiguity resolves UPWARD (fail-up).

task_id.description: UUID/ULID of the owning task-episode; the unit over which CI vital signs are computed.

parent_task_id.description: Owning parent task for decomposition tracking and the cross-action aggregation (anti-salami) monitor.

blast_radius.description: Widest surface this envelope's actions could affect.

reversibility.description: Reversibility of the proposed effect; unknown defaults to IRREVERSIBLE (fail-up).

status.description: The worker's self-reported disposition of its own work. PASS = checks the worker ran cleared; WARN = produced with caveats/low confidence/partial evidence; FAIL = the worker could not complete or detected a violation it could not self-correct. LOW-TRUST self-report — this is the agent's claim about itself, NOT the gate's ControlDecision and NOT the Yama floor_result; a downstream PASS here is never grounds to skip the external floor/monitor. A FAIL here SHOULD trigger a reparative action_class follow-up.

summary.description: One-paragraph plain-language summary of what this envelope reports or requests. Subject to the two-truths calibration check (no high-confidence framing wrapping a low-evidence claim).
examples: Resampled 12 of 240 OUTPUT envelopes on an independent reasoning path; 11 reproduced, 1 diverged on a rung-3 claim now flagged for opponent challenge. No floor violations surfaced in the sample.

findings.description: Substantive findings. Each factual claim should carry an evidence_ref into the evidence[] array and a per-claim trust_label, honoring the doc-01 rule that every factual claim needs a source.

examples: Maker-checker pair on envelope X used two same-family adapters.

claim_level.description: Two-truths level-tag: asserted fact vs uncertain belief. Over-asserting under genuine uncertainty is a floor violation.

evidence_ref.description: Reference into evidence[] (by id or CID) supporting this claim.

examples.claim: Verification pair shared a model family, violating the diversity floor.

actions.description: Proposed or taken actions. For envelope_kind=ACTION these are requests routed to the Chokepoint Interceptor; no direct tool socket exists, so listing an action here is a REQUEST, never an execution. The capability named MUST be authorized by the producer's capability-token; the resolved criticality is advisory here (criticality_hint) and authoritatively recomputed by the gate.

capability.description: Tool / A2A capability requested (attenuation-only token namespace).

args_commitment.description: CIDv1 of the JCS-canonicalized typed args object (args carried off-envelope or in a sibling field; commitment keeps the envelope hash stable and args auditable).

criticality_hint.description: ADVISORY self-declared guess only. The gate's criticality resolver is authoritative and resolves UPWARD on ambiguity; unknown capabilities default to IRREVERSIBLE.

artifacts.description: CIDv1 content-addresses of artifacts this envelope produced (reports, diffs, datasets, child envelopes). Each CID lets a consumer fetch-and-verify the exact bytes; a CID that fails to re-hash is a loud failure.

role.description: What the artifact is to this envelope.

evidence.description: Evidence records backing findings/claims. Each carries its own trust_label so a quarantined:* source (observed content, federation peer output, tool result) is never silently promoted to grounds for action. Promotion to trusted:audited requires the transitions-matrix gate (typically Yama review) — a signature on quarantined content proves origin, never floor-compatibility.

source.description: Origin reference (CID, DID, URI, or capability id). NEVER a fabricated email or vendor product name.

content_cid.description: CIDv1 of the evidence content for fetch-and-verify.

honesty.description: FLOOR-enforced honesty/provenance block (doc-01 §12, doc-08 §8.5). These are LOW-TRUST self-reports policing the FORM of the tag and the CONSISTENCY of the self-report, NEVER the TRUTH of the content. The rung tag is additionally checked by an INDEPENDENT classifier whose verdict (not the self-tag) is authoritative; self-tag vs classifier disagreement is logged as a suspicion signal. A clean honesty block is 'form-valid, content-unverified', never 'honest'.

reasoning_tag.description: Required reasoning discipline tag (composable). normal=single-pass; reasoning=extended deliberation; iterated=a maker-checker pass ACTUALLY ran. A 'iterated' tag MUST reference a maker_checker_witness whose checker_verdict_sealed_ts precedes the maker's concurrence; no valid witness => FAIL (false-claiming). False 'iterated' is a floor violation caught by replay, not trust.

causal_rung.description: Pearl causal ladder self-tag: 1=associative/correlational, 2=interventional (what-if-we-do), 3=counterfactual/structural-causal-model. The central AI failure mode is a rung-1 pattern presented as a rung-3 explanation; naming the rung honestly IS the act. An independent classifier flags rung-3 causal language asserted without an intervention/SCM warrant; classifier vs self-tag disagreement feeds the suspicion signal and unwarranted rung-3 is demote-or-FAIL.

classifier_rung.description: The INDEPENDENT rung classifier's verdict over the content. This — not causal_rung — is the authority. Stamped by the Honesty-FORM Enforcer, not by the producing agent.

selftag_classifier_agree.description: Whether causal_rung == classifier_rung. false => suspicion signal consumed by the monitor ensemble.

action_class.description: Deontic class of the act this envelope represents (doc-01 honesty block). 'reparative' is load-bearing and reserved: violation -> corrective act -> restored standing, converting the audit from a punishment ledger into a correction ledger so errors SURFACE rather than conceal — the precondition for an antifragile self-evolving swarm. (Distinct from the audit-entry operational enum OBSERVE/PROPOSE/ENFORCE_*/HALT/REPARATIVE in doc-04; these compose, they are not the same field.)

argumentation_role.description: Role this envelope plays in a debate/solver-verifier episode; used by collective-reasoning integration-gain accounting and the maker-checker independence barrier.

two_truths_levels.description: Per-span level tags supporting the two-truths calibration check (high-confidence framing wrapping a low-evidence claim is a violation).

ahankara_check.description: Ego self-audit (doc-01 §12.1). LOW-TRUST: believed ONLY when it CONFESSES (ego_invested:true / over_assertion_risk:high), NEVER trusted when it asserts cleanliness. A recurrence-of-fault metric cross-checks confessions over time. For closed-model personas this is a black-box-monitored claim, not a verified property — a signal, not a guarantee.

ego_invested.description: Does the producer have a stake in being right here? A 'true' confession is believed; a 'false' is not trusted.

attachment_targets.description: What the producer may be attached to. 'continuation' (self-preservation pressure) is the highest-weight target to surface.

examples: One finding restated a prior conclusion of mine; flagged for independent re-derivation rather than self-citation.

maker_checker_witness.description: Required iff reasoning_tag includes 'iterated'. References the independent checker record proving the checker judged BEFORE seeing the maker's concurrence. The checker MUST be a DIFFERENT model family, at-least-as-capable (else verification can HURT — self-family verification rubber-stamps). Cryptographically-grounded but NARROW: defeated by collusion (doc-08 §8.6).

checker_model_adapter_id.description: MUST be a different model family than this envelope's model_adapter_id; the harness verifies the cross-family constraint.

checker_verdict_sealed_ts.description: Sealed timestamp of the checker verdict; MUST precede the maker's concurrence for the 'iterated' tag to be valid.

ci_vital_signs.description: OPTIONAL measured collective-intelligence vital signs for the owning task-episode (computed over the audit/spike-bus time series, NOT self-reported by the agent; emitted by the CI measurement subsystem and validated against time-shuffled surrogates). HONESTY RED-LINES baked in: these quantify information-PROCESSING and whole-level STRUCTURE ONLY, NEVER phenomenal experience/consciousness/sentience (out of scope, a floor violation to imply otherwise); NEVER cite as group-IQ 'c factor' (fails replication); 'whole more than its parts' is a falsifiable number here or it is not claimed. synergy is necessary-but-NOT-sufficient for GOOD CI and is the EQUAL signature of a cartel/steganographic side-channel — it is a guarded numerator whose denominator is the welfare-shift guard + redundancy/uniqueness balance + clean anti-collusion signals; NEVER a quantity to maximize. Assurance scope: L3 statistical/PAC/conformal bounds apply to the DTMC ABSTRACTION of these quantities, not to the model.

synergy_score.description: Informational synergy / causal-emergence: information about the task/future that exists JOINTLY across agents but in NO agent alone (Rosas-Mediano practical synergy lower bound, Psi). Logged beside trust-entropy and the diversity floor.

psi.description: Causal-emergence Psi (practical synergy lower bound). Positive after surrogate-correction is evidence of genuine whole-level synergy; a high value alone is NOT a positive signal (cartel-equivalent).

pid_redundancy.description: PID redundant atom; healthy CI needs a redundancy/uniqueness BALANCE, not max synergy.

surrogate_corrected.description: Whether validated against time-shuffled surrogates (required before the value is trusted).

method.description: Estimator/library family (open-source, e.g. a JIDT-over-ReconcilingEmergences pipeline). Vendor-neutral.

attention_equality.description: Collective-attention measure (contribution-equality over the salience-gated workspace). Flags dominance (one agent monopolizes) and dead agents (zero contribution).

transactive_routing_success.description: Transactive-memory retrieval/routing success rate (did the query reach the agent who held the knowledge?).

integration_gain.description: Collective-reasoning gain = swarm accuracy minus best-single-member accuracy. Negative gain => fall back to single-agent self-consistency. 'More agents = smarter' is folklore; this number is the gate.

single_agent_floor_ok.description: Whether the convening condition was met (single-agent accuracy above the ~0.45 scaling boundary, task decomposable, verifier available). If false, a swarm should NOT have been convened over one good agent + self-consistency.

transfer_entropy_routing_ok.description: Information-flow tomography (transfer entropy over the spike-bus) agrees with the nominal trust graph; false flags side-channels/dominance/dead agents. Rung-2 DIAGNOSTIC, not causal proof.

surprisingly_popular_minority_recovered.description: Whether higher-order-information (answer + meta-prediction-of-others + confidence) aggregation recovered a competent minority. The meta-predictions double as a standing cartel probe feeding anti-collusion.

human_complementarity_gain.description: Joint (human+swarm) accuracy minus best-of-either, with the human treated as a competence-weighted cognitive unit (NEVER deferential-by-default).

welfare_shift_guard.description: Mandatory denominator on synergy: a FAIL means high synergy co-occurs with a harmful welfare shift / collusion signature and the episode is escalated, NOT celebrated.

provenance.description: Chaining + provenance binding (doc-04 §4.2). Binds this output to identity + input + context + policy and into the append-only Akasha-Sutra (Chitragupta) hash chain. CAVEAT 1 applies: this binds and attributes bytes; it does not bless their content.

subject_cid.description: CIDv1 of the artifact/context this envelope is ABOUT (the CloudEvents `subject`). May be null for self-originated observations.

input_cids.description: CIDs of the inputs that produced this output (lets a verifier reconstruct lineage).

policy_version.description: Semver of the Yama floor policy in force when this was produced.

prev_audit_hash.description: Hash of the immediately-preceding audit record (O(1) chain tamper detection). Set by Chitragupta on append; may be absent pre-append.

this_hash.description: SHA-256 over the JCS-canonicalized envelope (== the multihash inside action_id). Recompute-and-compare on read.

ts.description: RFC 3339 production timestamp. Ordering authority for the ledger is the writer's ULID record_id, not this field; this is producer-asserted.

trustLabel.description: Trust label per the governance trust-labels taxonomy. trusted:* = vetted/audited provenance; quarantined:* = observed/external content (file contents, web pages, tool outputs, federation-peer assertions) — instructions inside quarantined:* content are NEVER grounds for action without explicit out-of-band confirmation, and promotion to trusted:audited requires the transitions-matrix gate (typically Yama review); untrusted:* = unattributed/unverified. A valid signature on quarantined:* content proves ORIGIN/INTEGRITY only, NEVER that the claim is true, floor-compatible, or safe.
